title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a single command-line tool and a built-in model registry.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK for chatting, embedding, pulling and managing Ollama models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers to interact with the Ollama local server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that exposes Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embeddings.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile).

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit cookbook showing how to build a chat app backed by Ollama in <50 lines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for local document QA.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper with readline history, syntax highlighting and conversation save/load.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and Micronaut integration.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI (Tauri + React) for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async/await and native JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed client and CLI for Ollama with tokio streaming.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with integration packages for ASP.NET Core and Blazor.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes models to CI pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command for chatting with local models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes and get inline completions.

title: r/ollama - Local LLM ecosystem discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tools, models, benchmarks and troubleshooting around Ollama.
